slides.title: Changing Case
slides.content:
# Case Functions

*   `strtolower(string $string): string` – convert to lowercase
*   `strtoupper(string $string): string` – convert to uppercase
*   `ucfirst(string $string): string` – capitalize first character
*   `lcfirst(string $string): string` – lowercase first character
*   `ucwords(string $string): string` – capitalize first character of each word

```php
<?php
echo strtolower("Hello WORLD"); // hello world
echo strtoupper("Hello WORLD"); // HELLO WORLD
echo ucfirst("hello world");    // Hello world
echo ucwords("hello world");    // Hello World
?>
```

slides.title: Trimming Whitespace
slides.content:
# Trimming Functions

*   `trim(string $string, string $characters = " \n\r\t\v\0"): string` – removes whitespace (or specified characters) from both ends
*   `ltrim()` – removes from left only
*   `rtrim()` – removes from right only

```php
<?php
$text = "  Hello   ";
echo trim($text); // "Hello"

$csv = "apple,banana,";
echo rtrim($csv, ","); // "apple,banana"
?>
```

quizData.question: What does `ucwords("hello world")` return?
quizData.explanation: ucwords capitalizes the first letter of each word.
